entities.name: Voice Primitive: Tantamount Analogy

entities.name: Analogy Pattern

entities.name: Product Value Defense
entities.context: The strategic use case for this primitive: defending the value proposition of a product against reductive questioning

relationships.context: This primitive is classified as an analogy-type rhetorical device
